text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is always making food for me, so I want to return the
favor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In pursuit of that goal, I head to the shopping mall to scope out my
options.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Fancy meeting you here! Are you doing some shopping?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was just taking a peek at all the sweet and savory options here. If I
notice anything new, I want to give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I had some raspberry macarons! After I found a spot in the
sitting area, I gobbled them right up. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But not before I took a picture, of course. I have to send something
along with my review to my parents.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You see, whenever I find a new tasty treat, I send them a pic and a
review.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Both my parents work in the culinary field, so they really enjoy
reading about my finds.
choice_data_list:
Oh yeah, it was your parents who taught you to
cook, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm, that's right! My dad is a chef at an Italian restaurant, and my
mom is a patissier.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So even though I loooove cooking, I also enjoy searching for new
dishes to share with my parents!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does seem to be enjoying herself. Perhaps this is my chance to
repay her with some good, homemade food.
choice_data_list: Is there anything else you're craving right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! You don't need to pay me back for that! I get all the repayment I need watching you eat my food!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You always have such a big smile on your face when you eat my
cooking. That's more than enough.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's a little hard to explain, but... I can feel this warm, fuzzy feeling
filling my heart to the brim when I watch you eat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, seriously, you don't need to worry about it. ☆
choice_data_list:
But always being on the receiving end is a little
awkward.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Then how about this? I want to see you eat my food again,
so come over for dinner, and I'll make you something!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ Time to get shopping! If we want ingredients, I think the
shopping district is better than the mall.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I hope you're ready for a real smorgasbord!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of simmering some chicken and vegetables in water to
start, but other than that—

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sumo wrestlers!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What?! Where? Where?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the gleeful cries and pointed fingers of the children, we
both see a couple of sumo wrestlers on their way back from practice.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, real-life sumo wrestlers! Trainer, do you think I can go talk to
them?
choice_data_list: As long as they don't mind.
As long as they don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Right, of course!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Hello!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono beams with joy as the sumo wrestlers turn to meet her
calls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They answer her various questions with smiles on their faces. I'm sure
Hishi Akebono's enthusiasm tickles them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? So that's what you put in your hot pot...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I see. A nutritious bowl of chanko really is the key to strength.

text_block_list.name: Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text: Haha, you know it! Without that hot pot, we'd never get this strong!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text: After all, it's food made with feeling. No way you can eat that and not get strong!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I bet whoever's making the hot pot really wants you to enjoy your
food! I feel the same way when I cook for others.

text_block_list.name: Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's not just the cook's feelings, you know!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sumo Wrestler
text_block_list.text:
You can't have a true chanko without adding feelings from the people
eating your food! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: A true chanko... The feelings from the people eating...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I don't get it. How are you supposed to add the feelings of
the people eating to a hot pot?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I mean, they're not going to eat it until it's done, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So how can you add their feelings in... before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a suspicion that the sumo wrestler was referring to the
gratitude both sides feel for each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that's why most meals begin with a thank-you said before
digging in... The food just feels incomplete without it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: A true chanko... Do you have any ideas, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Just a hunch. Let's test it out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? How?
choice_data_list: Next time, I'll be the one cooking.
Next time, I'll be the one cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm, maybe that'll give me some kind of hint...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it! I'm looking forward to a good meal, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting from the day we met, Hishi Akebono has served me delicious
meal after delicious meal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I finally have a chance to repay her with a meal full of gratitude!
